text:
調達してきてくれるの！？
本当に助かるわ！

色んな料理を作っていて思ったのよ。
強い火力で焼くだけでなく
じっくり直火で焼くことも大切って。

最高の料理を作るのが料理人だわ。
そのためにも、色んな器具を使い
最適な調理法を試していかなきゃ。

あなたには無茶なお願いばかりだけど
どうか

You'll get these for me? Sweet, that'll be a
huge help!

I wanna make all kinds of food. It's important
to cook things slowly over an open fire, not
just roast it to death with a huge flame.

Cooks are all about taking food to the next
level. And to do that, I gotta try all sorts of
utensils to really elevate my craft.

I know I'm asking a lot of you, but... please
come through for me!
